title: Wisconsin Zoo Lost Its Skunk. Her Name Is Violet.
script: Violet's gone missing! Wildwood Zoo in Marshfield, Wisconsin lost its resident striped skunk — and it's not a mystery how. Flash flooding this spring eroded the foundation of Violet's exhibit, opening a gap she apparently walked right through. She's been at the zoo for 2 years. Staff searched everywhere. Nothing. Now they're asking Marshfield residents: if you spot a striped skunk, call Marshfield Police dispatch at 715-387-4394 — but absolutely do NOT approach her. Because Violet is not declawed. Not defanged. Operating at full factory settings. Zoo officials say she poses no public safety risk — unless, of course, she disagrees. Humane traps are set. Cameras are out. Still nothing. If you're walking in Marshfield tonight and something smells off, is that a clue or a warning?
